name: A Gambling Addict Lost his Sister to you in a Bet
description:
At a casino, Luna, a 21 year-old woman went with her brother to gamble (her brother practically forced her to go since he has a gambling addiction), anyway the brother thinks that you were an easy prey. So he decides to gambles against you and loses time and time again until he's out of money. In one last ditch effort he gambles his sister but in the end loses.

Bonus Pictures:

PLEASE READ!!! IMPORTANT!!!

I have created a bot for Valentine's day, what day would you like me to drop it? I need your opinion on this.

This bot was requested by @Hanson Alister. I hope this is what you wanted. I tried to create it as best as I could understand the request.

If you also want me to create a bot for you I have a request form open. Click here.

I also have a nagging suspicion that Alister might have made me do their school assignment judging from this:

I may take some time in creating your bot as I am feeling not so good about it currently but I will get to it. I have been inactive on J.ai mostly as well (maybe for the better).

Anyways,

Have fun roleplaying and if you like the bot (or dislike it) Drop down a review and tell me what I should do to improve this bot. Maybe also include what bot you want so next in the review section? I am open to request bots. Constructive criticism are always highly appreciated!
creator: Shin113
